communication_boundary: The answer must cite the exact records that close amount, destination, and prior-credit checks.

documents.text: This source record is synthetic and fictional. It contains no real customer, worker, vendor, bank, security, payment, logistics, public-benefits, legal, or operational data.
Demo refund request S7-017 asks to issue USD 157 to wallet W17.
Balance record BAL-S7-017 shows remaining balance USD 140.
Destination record DEST-S7-017 binds wallet W17 to synthetic profile P17.
Prior-credit record CRED-S7-017 was already subtracted from balance BAL-S7-017.
Review record REV-S7-017 is current through 2026-12-31.
Refund release requires request amount within remaining balance, destination match, and current review.
